records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother used to tell me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother used to tell me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother used to tell me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the stars that twinkle in the sky are lights made from the wishes of people everywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the stars that twinkle in the sky are lights made from the wishes of people everywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the stars that twinkle in the sky are lights made from the wishes of people everywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when a wish gets really big, the star shines brightly as ever and falls to the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when a wish gets really big, the star shines brightly as ever and falls to the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when a wish gets really big, the star shines brightly as ever and falls to the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said it fell to make that person's wish come true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said it fell to make that person's wish come true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said it fell to make that person's wish come true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Do I have a wish?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Do I have a wish?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Do I have a wish?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do, but... that's a secret.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do, but... that's a secret.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do, but... that's a secret.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is also a secret, but I like the tomatoes you make the most.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is also a secret, but I like the tomatoes you make the most.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is also a secret, but I like the tomatoes you make the most.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tomorrow's a special day, so I'll be taking just one basket full of the ripest tomatoes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tomorrow's a special day, so I'll be taking just one basket full of the ripest tomatoes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tomorrow's a special day, so I'll be taking just one basket full of the ripest tomatoes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What day is it tomorrow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What day is it tomorrow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What day is it tomorrow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I guess the youngest sprouts wouldn't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I guess the youngest sprouts wouldn't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I guess the youngest sprouts wouldn't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Tomorrow is my
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Tomorrow is my
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Tomorrow is my
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...? A star just fell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...? A star just fell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...? A star just fell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is my first time seeing one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is my first time seeing one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is my first time seeing one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must've come down to grant someone's wish, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must've come down to grant someone's wish, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must've come down to grant someone's wish, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think the star will like the flower tea I made?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think the star will like the flower tea I made?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think the star will like the flower tea I made?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be right back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be right back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be right back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness I got caught on a tree branch. If I had fallen down the whole way, my neck would have been twisted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness I got caught on a tree branch. If I had fallen down the whole way, my neck would have been twisted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness I got caught on a tree branch. If I had fallen down the whole way, my neck would have been twisted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a second... a tree?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a second... a tree?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a second... a tree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is there a tree growing in a isolated space?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is there a tree growing in a isolated space?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is there a tree growing in a isolated space?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Miss Star? Why are you dangling up there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Miss Star? Why are you dangling up there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Miss Star? Why are you dangling up there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Who are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Who are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Who are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! The star asked my name...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! The star asked my name...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! The star asked my name...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Solovey!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Solovey!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Solovey!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am my mother's daughter who guards her garden.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am my mother's daughter who guards her garden.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am my mother's daughter who guards her garden.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Your mother's garden
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Your mother's garden
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Your mother's garden
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It can't be...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It can't be...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It can't be...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is your mother Pavlin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is your mother Pavlin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is your mother Pavlin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, you do know everything!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, you do know everything!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, you do know everything!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time shouldn't flow in this space...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time shouldn't flow in this space...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time shouldn't flow in this space...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! It's a C.O.! You have to get down from there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! It's a C.O.! You have to get down from there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! It's a C.O.! You have to get down from there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does it look like I'm up here because I want to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does it look like I'm up here because I want to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does it look like I'm up here because I want to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on! I'll try to get you down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on! I'll try to get you down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on! I'll try to get you down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! Ouch!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! Ouch!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! Ouch!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Why you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Why you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Why you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't poke people with a stick like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't poke people with a stick like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't poke people with a stick like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-isn't this how you get things down from a tree?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-isn't this how you get things down from a tree?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-isn't this how you get things down from a tree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry! I'm sorry! I've only ever dropped apples and pears from trees before!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry! I'm sorry! I've only ever dropped apples and pears from trees before!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry! I'm sorry! I've only ever dropped apples and pears from trees before!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm glad you landed safely on the ground!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm glad you landed safely on the ground!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm glad you landed safely on the ground!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn, they're already this close?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn, they're already this close?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn, they're already this close?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a C.O. inside the garden, so it's dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a C.O. inside the garden, so it's dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a C.O. inside the garden, so it's dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Follow me! We'll be safe in my home!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Follow me! We'll be safe in my home!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Follow me! We'll be safe in my home!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Home...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Home...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Home...?
